Hear the Difference · h · th · i
Listening drill

Train your ear for the sounds English hides in plain sight.

Ninety-two minimal pairs, recorded. You hear one word; you choose which of two near-identical spellings was actually said. Three contrasts that trip up most learners:

/h/

The dropped H

Whether the breath at the start is there at all.

heat · eat
/ð/ vs /d/,/z/

The voiced TH

The soft buzz that becomes a hard d or z.

they · day
/iː/ vs /ɪ/

Long vs short i

The tense ee against the lax, clipped ih.

sheep · ship
/h/ 1 / 92 Score 0 · Streak 0

Press R to replay · 1/2 to choose

Which word did you hear?

That's the set.

0%

Built from an Anki deck of 92 recorded minimal pairs (h · th · i). Audio embedded — works fully offline. One card from the original ("hair / air") was dropped because its recording was mislabelled.
